rulings.Case Title: EDUARDO TAY VS. HENRY PAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Violation Of Court Order And To Compel Site Inspection; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defense Counsel Sze Hang Lo And Shl Law Group
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 1, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF EDUARDO TAY Motion For Violation Of Court Order And To Compel Site Inspection; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defense Counsel Sze Hang Lo And Shl Law Group GRANTED. Site inspection to take place no later than August 5, 2016 on at least a 48-hour notice. Motion to Compel Deposition is Denied. It is not supported by sufficient evidence. See Kim declaration. Request for sanctions against Sze Hang Lo, Martin Guerbadot and SHL Law Group in the amount of $9,650 is GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 1, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF MARK FELIX MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL HO VS. CAN TANG YU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft'S Attendance At Deposition, To Compel Production Of Records, And For Sanctions For Failure To Attend Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 1, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HO Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft'S Attendance At Deposition, To Compel Production Of Records, And For Sanctions For Failure To Attend Deposition is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall appear for deposition no later than August 5, 2016 on a 5 day notice. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,862.29 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELVIN COLEMAN VS. JUAN GODOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Prosed Response; And Proposed Response
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday August 1, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT JUAN GODOY Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Prosed Response; And Proposed Response The Motion to Vacate the Default is Denied. Moving party failed to sustain his burden under CCP 473(b). Default judgment is vacated as it was entered due to a clerical error. The operative first amended complaint does not include the Notice to Pay or Quit or the 1007 form. = (501/REQ)
